Rara Anjali Apsarini

UI/UX Designer • Web Developer • IoT Enthusiast

Building seamless digital interfaces and connected physical devices. Passionate about bridging the gap between elegant software design and robust system engineering.

Download CV Contact Me
01. Discovery

About Me

Driven by curiosity, fueled by logic.

Currently pursuing my Bachelor's degree in Informatics Engineering, I focus on design patterns, network architectures, and hardware-software integration. I love converting complex problems into intuitive, user-focused digital experiences.

Whether coding interactive web applications or writing firmware for microcontroller networks, I strive to write clean, maintainable code. My academic background combined with self-driven practical projects helps me adapt quickly to new technologies and workflows.

02. Academics

Education

2023 — Present

Bachelor of Science in Informatics Engineering

Universitas Indonesia

Focusing on Algorithms & Data Structures, Software Engineering, Computer Networks, and Database Systems. Active member of the engineering student council, maintaining a cumulative GPA of 3.82/4.00.

2020 — 2023

Vocational High School Major in Software Engineering

SMKN 1 Jakarta

Laid core foundations in web development, object-oriented programming (Java), database systems (MySQL), and basic hardware assembly. Graduated at the top of the software engineering stream.

Technical Skills

Frontend Development

HTML5 CSS3 JavaScript (ES6+) React.js Vue.js Sass/SCSS Bootstrap

Node.js Express.js Python (Flask/Django) Go (Golang) PostgreSQL MongoDB RESTful APIs

Figma Wireframing Prototyping User Personas Visual Hierarchy Design Systems

Networking

Cisco Packet Tracer TCP/IP Protocol Suite Subnetting Network Routing & Switching Wireshark Analysis Firewall & Security

Arduino IDE C/C++ (Microcontrollers) ESP32 / ESP8266 Raspberry Pi (Python) MQTT Protocol Sensors Integration
04. Works

Featured Projects

Smart Crop Monitoring System

An IoT-based crop health dashboard utilizing ESP32 microcontrollers, moisture sensors, and AWS IoT Core. Transmits real-time environmental metrics to a React dashboard.

ESP32 AWS IoT React MQTT

Secure Medical Records API

A high-performance RESTful API built in Go (Golang) featuring JWT authentication, role-based access control, and SQLite encryption to secure sensitive patient healthcare data.

Golang JWT SQLite Clean Architecture

EcoRoute Navigation App

UX research and user-centered design for a mobile navigation app that prioritizes low-emission routing. Built fully interactive interactive design mockups in Figma.

Figma UX Design Wireframing Prototyping

07. Principles

Professional Values

Integrity

Committed to architectural honesty, clean reliable code, and ethical data privacy standards across all engineering efforts.

Responsibility

Taking ownership of code quality, systems reliability, and meeting development targets responsibly and on time.

Teamwork

Fostering synergy, clear interpersonal communication, and active knowledge sharing in cross-functional agile development groups.

Continuous Learning

Constantly exploring emerging frameworks, firmware updates, design systems, and software engineering methodologies.
